            source
            def L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (l : Nat) :
            Prop
            Equations
            • L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine s l = ∀ (i : Nat) (h : i < s.tokens.size), s.tokens[i].pos.line = l
            Instances For
              source
              def L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.EndLineOnLine (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
              Prop
              Equations
              • L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.EndLineOnLine s = (s.simpleKey.possible = true → s.simpleKey.endLine = s.line ∧ s.simpleKey.pos.line = s.line)
              Instances For
                source
                def L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.StackEndLineOnLine (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (l : Nat) :
                Prop
                Equations
                • L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.StackEndLineOnLine s l = match s.simpleKeyStack.back? with | none => True | some sk => sk.possible = true → sk.endLine = l ∧ sk.pos.line = l
                Instances For
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanValueValidate_ok_of_flow_allTokensOnLine (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_ek : s.explicitKeyLine = none) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s s.line) (h_end : EndLineOnLine s) :
                  Scanner.scanValueValidate s = Except.ok ()
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.saveSimpleKey_filter_placeholder (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  Array.filter (fun (t : Positioned YamlToken) => t.val != YamlToken.placeholder) (Scanner.saveSimpleKey s).tokens = Array.filter (fun (t : Positioned YamlToken) => t.val != YamlToken.placeholder) s.tokens
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine_emit (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (tok : YamlToken) (l : Nat) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s l) (h_line : s.line = l) :
                  AllTokensOnLine (s.emit tok) l

                  Pushing one token at currentPos preserves AllTokensOnLine.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine_advance (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (l : Nat) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s l) :
                  AllTokensOnLine s.advance l

                  Advancing preserves AllTokensOnLine (tokens unchanged).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine_saveSimpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (l : Nat) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s l) (h_line : s.line = l) :
                  AllTokensOnLine (Scanner.saveSimpleKey s) l

                  saveSimpleKey preserves AllTokensOnLine (pushes 0 or 2 placeholders at currentPos).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.EndLineOnLine_saveSimpleKey_flow (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_prev : EndLineOnLine s) :
                  EndLineOnLine (Scanner.saveSimpleKey s)

                  saveSimpleKey establishes EndLineOnLine in flow context. Both endLine and pos.line are set from s.line when saving.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine_emitAt (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) (tok : YamlToken) (l : Nat) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s l) (h_pos_line : pos.line = l) :
                  AllTokensOnLine (s.emitAt pos tok) l

                  emitAt with a pos on line l preserves AllTokensOnLine.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine_scanFlowSequenceStart (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (l : Nat) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s l) (h_line : s.line = l) :
                  AllTokensOnLine (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s) l

                  scanFlowSequenceStart preserves AllTokensOnLine.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine_scanFlowMappingStart (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (l : Nat) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s l) (h_line : s.line = l) :
                  AllTokensOnLine (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s) l

                  scanFlowMappingStart preserves AllTokensOnLine.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceStart_simpleKey_not_possible (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s).simpleKey.possible = false

                  scanFlowSequenceStart sets simpleKey.possible to false.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingStart_simpleKey_not_possible (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s).simpleKey.possible = false

                  scanFlowMappingStart sets simpleKey.possible to false.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine_scanFlowSequenceEnd (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (l : Nat) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s l) (h_line : s.line = l) :
                  AllTokensOnLine (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s) l

                  scanFlowSequenceEnd preserves AllTokensOnLine.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine_scanFlowMappingEnd (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (l : Nat) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s l) (h_line : s.line = l) :
                  AllTokensOnLine (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s) l

                  scanFlowMappingEnd preserves AllTokensOnLine.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine_scanFlowEntry (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (l : Nat) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s l) (h_line : s.line = l) :
                  AllTokensOnLine (have __src := (s.emit YamlToken.flowEntry).advance; { input := __src.input, inputEnd := __src.inputEnd, offset := __src.offset, line := __src.line, col := __src.col, indents := __src.indents, flowLevel := __src.flowLevel, tokens := __src.tokens, simpleKey := __src.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := __src.simpleKeyStack, needIndentCheck := __src.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := __src.allowDirectives, seenYamlDirective := __src.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := __src.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := __src.documentEverStarted, flowStack := __src.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := __src.explicitKeyLine, comments := __src.comments, definedAnchors := __src.definedAnchors }) l

                  scanFlowEntry preserves AllTokensOnLine (emit .flowEntry → advance → set simpleKeyAllowed).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine_allowDirectives (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (l : Nat) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s l) :
                  AllTokensOnLine (if s.allowDirectives = true then { input := s.input, inputEnd := s.inputEnd, offset := s.offset, line := s.line, col := s.col, indents := s.indents, flowLevel := s.flowLevel, tokens := s.tokens, simpleKey := s.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := s.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := s.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := false, seenYamlDirective := s.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := true, flowStack := s.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s.explicitKeyLine, comments := s.comments, definedAnchors := s.definedAnchors } else s) l

                  allowDirectives struct update preserves AllTokensOnLine (no token changes).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine_scanValuePrepare_flow (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (l : Nat) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s l) (h_line : s.line = l) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_ek : s.explicitKeyLine = none) (h_endline : EndLineOnLine s) :
                  AllTokensOnLine (Scanner.scanValuePrepare s) l

                  scanValuePrepare in flow context preserves AllTokensOnLine. When simpleKey.possible, setIfInBounds replaces a token whose new pos.line equals the current line (from EndLineOnLine's pos.line conjunct).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.AllTokensOnLine_scanDoubleQuoted (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_ok : Scanner.scanDoubleQuoted s = Except.ok s') (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (l : Nat) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s l) (h_line : s.line = l) :
                  AllTokensOnLine s' l

                  scanDoubleQuoted preserves AllTokensOnLine: the loop doesn't add tokens, and emitAt pushes one token at currentPos.line = s.line.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanDoubleQuoted_preserves_simpleKey (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_ok : Scanner.scanDoubleQuoted s = Except.ok s') :
                  s'.simpleKey = s.simpleKey

                  scanDoubleQuoted preserves simpleKey: the loop, advance, and emitAt don't modify simpleKey.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_preprocess_init_state (input : String) (c : Char) (rest : List Char) (h_toList : input.toList = c :: rest) (h_nws : CharPredicates.isWhiteSpaceBool c = false) (h_nlb : CharPredicates.isLineBreakBool c = false) (h_nc : c ≠ '#') :
                  ∃ (s_pp : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken_preprocess ((Scanner.ScannerState.mk' input).emit YamlToken.streamStart) = Except.ok (some (s_pp, c)) ∧ s_pp.flowLevel = 0 ∧ s_pp.inFlow = false ∧ s_pp.currentIndent = -1 ∧ s_pp.col = 0 ∧ s_pp.allowDirectives = true ∧ s_pp.directivesPresent = false ∧ s_pp.indents = #[{ column := -1, isSequence := false }] ∧ s_pp.input = input ∧ s_pp.offset = 0 ∧ s_pp.inputEnd = input.utf8ByteSize ∧ s_pp.explicitKeyLine = none ∧ s_pp.line = 0 ∧ AllTokensOnLine s_pp s_pp.line ∧ Array.filter (fun (t : Positioned YamlToken) => t.val != YamlToken.placeholder) s_pp.tokens = Array.filter (fun (t : Positioned YamlToken) => t.val != YamlToken.placeholder) ((Scanner.ScannerState.mk' input).emit YamlToken.streamStart).tokens

                  Preprocessing on the initial scanner state returns the first character.

                  For any non-empty input string starting with a non-blank, non-comment, non-line-break character c, preprocessing the initial state (ScannerState.mk' input).emit .streamStart succeeds and returns (s_pp, c) with all position/metadata fields preserved.

                  This is the common first step for all scanNextToken_emit*_init proofs.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_emitScalar_init (content : String) :
                  ∃ (s₁ : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken ((Scanner.ScannerState.mk' (Emit.emitScalar content)).emit YamlToken.streamStart) = Except.ok (some s₁) ∧ s₁.peek? = none ∧ s₁.flowLevel = 0 ∧ s₁.directivesPresent = false ∧ (∃ (tok : Positioned YamlToken), tok ∈ s₁.tokens ∧ tok.val = YamlToken.scalar content ScalarStyle.doubleQuoted) ∧ s₁.indents = #[{ column := -1, isSequence := false }] ∧ Array.map (fun (x : Positioned YamlToken) => x.val) (Array.filter (fun (t : Positioned YamlToken) => t.val != YamlToken.placeholder) s₁.tokens) = #[YamlToken.streamStart, YamlToken.scalar content ScalarStyle.doubleQuoted]
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scan_accepts_emitScalar (content : String) :
                  ∃ (tokens : Array (Positioned YamlToken)), Scanner.scanFiltered (Emit.emitScalar content) = Except.ok tokens

                  Scalar case: The scanner accepts any double-quoted scalar produced by the emitter.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scan_emptySeq_test :
                  (Scanner.scanFiltered "[]").isOk = true
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scan_emptyMap_test :
                  (Scanner.scanFiltered "{}").isOk = true
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scan_singleScalarSeq_test :
                  (Scanner.scanFiltered "[\"hello\"]").isOk = true
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scan_twoScalarSeq_test :
                  (Scanner.scanFiltered "[\"a\", \"b\"]").isOk = true
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scan_nestedSeq_test :
                  (Scanner.scanFiltered "[[\"a\"]]").isOk = true
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_preprocess_flow (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (rest : List Char) (col : Nat) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := c :: rest, col := col }) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_nws : CharPredicates.isWhiteSpaceBool c = false) (h_nlb : CharPredicates.isLineBreakBool c = false) (h_nc : c ≠ '#') :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_preprocess s = Except.ok (some (Scanner.saveSimpleKey s, c))

                  In flow context, scanNextToken_preprocess with a content character returns some (saveSimpleKey s, c) unchanged. The proof relies on:

                  1. skipToContent is identity for non-ws/non-lb/non-comment chars
                  2. !s.inFlow = false skips unwindIndents
                  3. indents.size unchanged → trailing content check is false
                  4. saveSimpleKey preserves peek
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_preprocess_flow_ws1 (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (rest : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := ' ' :: c :: rest, col := s.col }) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_nws : CharPredicates.isWhiteSpaceBool c = false) (h_nlb : CharPredicates.isLineBreakBool c = false) (h_nc : c ≠ '#') (h_indent : s.currentIndent < 0) :
                  ∃ (s₁ : Scanner.ScannerState), CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s₁ { chars := c :: rest, col := s₁.col } ∧ s₁.inFlow = true ∧ s₁.flowLevel = s.flowLevel ∧ s₁.currentIndent = s.currentIndent ∧ s₁.col = s.col + 1 ∧ s₁.directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ s₁.indents = s.indents ∧ s₁.explicitKeyLine = s.explicitKeyLine ∧ s₁.line = s.line ∧ Scanner.scanNextToken_preprocess s = Scanner.scanNextToken_preprocess s₁ ∧ (AllTokensOnLine s s.line → AllTokensOnLine s₁ s₁.line) ∧ (EndLineOnLine s → EndLineOnLine s₁) ∧ s₁.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchStructural_none_flow (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_indent : s.currentIndent < 0) (h_col_pos : s.col > 0) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchStructural s c = Except.ok none

                  dispatchStructural returns none for non-structural characters in flow context when the column is past any document boundary position.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.checkBlockFlowIndent_ok_flow (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_checkBlockFlowIndent s c = Except.ok ()

                  checkBlockFlowIndent succeeds for non-bracket characters or when in flow.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchFlowIndicators_none (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (h1 : c ≠ '[') (h2 : c ≠ ']') (h3 : c ≠ '{') (h4 : c ≠ '}') (h5 : c ≠ ',') :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchFlowIndicators s c = Except.ok none

                  dispatchFlowIndicators returns none for non-flow-indicator characters.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchBlockIndicators_none_quote (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchBlockIndicators s '\"' = Except.ok none

                  dispatchBlockIndicators returns none for '"' (and many other chars).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceStart_preserves_dp (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s).directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceStart_preserves_indents (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s).indents = s.indents
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceStart_preserves_ek (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s).explicitKeyLine = s.explicitKeyLine
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceStart_line_eq (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s).line = s.advance.line
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceStart_flowLevel_eq (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s).flowLevel = s.flowLevel + 1
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceStart_detail (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (rest : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := '[' :: rest, col := s.col }) :
                  CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s) { chars := rest, col := s.col + 1 } ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s).flowLevel = s.flowLevel + 1 ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s).directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s).indents = s.indents ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s).col = s.col + 1

                  scanFlowSequenceStart advances past [, giving specific ScannerSurfCorr and field preservation.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_via_content_dispatch (s s_pp s_ad s_result : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (h_pp : Scanner.scanNextToken_preprocess s = Except.ok (some (s_pp, c))) (h_struct : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchStructural s_pp c = Except.ok none) (h_ad_eq : s_ad = if s_pp.allowDirectives = true then { input := s_pp.input, inputEnd := s_pp.inputEnd, offset := s_pp.offset, line := s_pp.line, col := s_pp.col, indents := s_pp.indents, flowLevel := s_pp.flowLevel, tokens := s_pp.tokens, simpleKey := s_pp.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := s_pp.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s_pp.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := s_pp.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := false, seenYamlDirective := s_pp.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s_pp.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := true, flowStack := s_pp.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s_pp.explicitKeyLine, comments := s_pp.comments, definedAnchors := s_pp.definedAnchors } else s_pp) (h_check : Scanner.scanNextToken_checkBlockFlowIndent s_ad c = Except.ok ()) (h_flow : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchFlowIndicators s_ad c = Except.ok none) (h_block : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchBlockIndicators s_ad c = Except.ok none) (h_content : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchContent s_ad c = Except.ok s_result) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken s = Except.ok (some s_result)

                  When preprocessing succeeds, structural dispatch returns none, flow indicators return none, block indicators return none, and content dispatch produces s_result, then scanNextToken returns some s_result.

                  s_ad is the state after the allowDirectives update.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_via_block_dispatch (s s_pp s_ad s_result : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (h_pp : Scanner.scanNextToken_preprocess s = Except.ok (some (s_pp, c))) (h_struct : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchStructural s_pp c = Except.ok none) (h_ad_eq : s_ad = if s_pp.allowDirectives = true then { input := s_pp.input, inputEnd := s_pp.inputEnd, offset := s_pp.offset, line := s_pp.line, col := s_pp.col, indents := s_pp.indents, flowLevel := s_pp.flowLevel, tokens := s_pp.tokens, simpleKey := s_pp.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := s_pp.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s_pp.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := s_pp.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := false, seenYamlDirective := s_pp.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s_pp.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := true, flowStack := s_pp.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s_pp.explicitKeyLine, comments := s_pp.comments, definedAnchors := s_pp.definedAnchors } else s_pp) (h_check : Scanner.scanNextToken_checkBlockFlowIndent s_ad c = Except.ok ()) (h_flow : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchFlowIndicators s_ad c = Except.ok none) (h_block : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchBlockIndicators s_ad c = Except.ok (some s_result)) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken s = Except.ok (some s_result)

                  When preprocessing succeeds, structural/flow dispatches return none, and block indicator dispatch produces a result, then scanNextToken returns that result. This is used for : (value indicator) in flow context, which goes through scanNextToken_dispatchBlockIndicators.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_flow_scanDoubleQuoted (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (content : String) (rest : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := ['\"'] ++ (Emit.escapeString content).toList ++ ['\"'] ++ rest, col := s.col }) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_indent : s.currentIndent < 0) (h_col_pos : s.col > 0) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s s.line) (h_endline : EndLineOnLine s) :
                  ∃ (s' : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken s = Except.ok (some s') ∧ CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s' { chars := rest, col := s'.col } ∧ s'.flowLevel = s.flowLevel ∧ s'.directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ s'.indents = s.indents ∧ s'.explicitKeyLine = s.explicitKeyLine ∧ s'.col > 0 ∧ (∀ (t : YamlToken), Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? s'.tokens = some t → t ≠ YamlToken.flowSequenceStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowMappingStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowEntry) ∧ s'.simpleKeyAllowed = false ∧ s'.line = s.line ∧ AllTokensOnLine s' s'.line ∧ EndLineOnLine s' ∧ s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

                  In flow context with state at '"', scanNextToken dispatches to scanDoubleQuoted, which succeeds and advances past the quoted scalar. Combines preprocessing, all-none dispatches, and content dispatch.

                  This is the flow-context analog of scanNextToken_emitScalar_init.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchStructural_none_bracket_init (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_fl : s.flowLevel = 0) (h_noDocStart : Scanner.atDocumentStart s = false) (h_noDocEnd : Scanner.atDocumentEnd s = false) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchStructural s '[' = Except.ok none

                  Structural dispatch returns none for [ at initial state.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.checkBlockFlowIndent_bracket_init (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_fl : s.flowLevel = 0) (h_indent : s.currentIndent = -1) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_checkBlockFlowIndent s '[' = Except.ok ()

                  checkBlockFlowIndent passes for [ at initial state (currentIndent = -1 < 0, so the guard is false).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchFlowIndicators_bracket (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchFlowIndicators s '[' = Except.ok (some (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s))

                  Flow dispatch for [ returns some (scanFlowSequenceStart s).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_flow_open_init (input : String) (rest : List Char) (h_toList : input.toList = '[' :: rest) :
                  have s₀ := (Scanner.ScannerState.mk' input).emit YamlToken.streamStart; ∃ (s' : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken s₀ = Except.ok (some s') ∧ CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s' { chars := rest, col := s'.col } ∧ s'.flowLevel = 1 ∧ s'.directivesPresent = false ∧ s'.indents = s₀.indents ∧ s'.col = 1 ∧ s'.inFlow = true ∧ s'.currentIndent < 0 ∧ s'.explicitKeyLine = none ∧ s'.line = 0 ∧ AllTokensOnLine s' 0 ∧ EndLineOnLine s' ∧ s'.simpleKey.possible = false ∧ Array.map (fun (x : Positioned YamlToken) => x.val) (Array.filter (fun (t : Positioned YamlToken) => t.val != YamlToken.placeholder) s'.tokens) = #[YamlToken.streamStart, YamlToken.flowSequenceStart] ∧ s'.simpleKeyStack.size = s'.flowLevel

                  scanNextToken on the initial scanner state at [ dispatches to scanFlowSequenceStart, entering flow context.

                  Result state has flowLevel = 1 (i.e. inFlow = true), currentIndent = -1, col = 1, and ScannerSurfCorr at rest.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.nat_beq_zero_false (n : Nat) (h : n > 0) :
                  (n == 0) = false
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.nat_beq_zero_true {n : Nat} (h : n = 0) :
                  (n == 0) = true
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_flow_open_nested (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (rest : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := '[' :: rest, col := s.col }) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_indent : s.currentIndent < 0) (h_col_pos : s.col > 0) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s s.line) (h_endline : EndLineOnLine s) :
                  ∃ (s' : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken s = Except.ok (some s') ∧ CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s' { chars := rest, col := s'.col } ∧ s'.flowLevel = s.flowLevel + 1 ∧ s'.directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ s'.indents = s.indents ∧ s'.explicitKeyLine = s.explicitKeyLine ∧ s'.col = s.col + 1 ∧ s'.line = s.line ∧ AllTokensOnLine s' s'.line ∧ EndLineOnLine s' ∧ StackEndLineOnLine s' s'.line ∧ s'.simpleKeyStack.pop = s.simpleKeyStack

                  scanNextToken dispatches [ in flow context to scanFlowSequenceStart, incrementing flowLevel. Similar to scanNextToken_flow_open_init but for the nested case where flowLevel > 0.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchBlockIndicators_none_comma (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchBlockIndicators s ',' = Except.ok none

                  dispatchBlockIndicators returns none for ,.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchBlockIndicators_none_close_bracket (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchBlockIndicators s ']' = Except.ok none

                  dispatchBlockIndicators returns none for ].

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.checkBlockFlowIndent_ok_comma (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_checkBlockFlowIndent s ',' = Except.ok ()

                  checkBlockFlowIndent passes for , (the guard only fires for [ or {).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.checkBlockFlowIndent_ok_close_bracket (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_checkBlockFlowIndent s ']' = Except.ok ()

                  checkBlockFlowIndent passes for ] (the guard only fires for [ or {).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowEntry_ok (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_last : ∀ (t : YamlToken), Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? s.tokens = some t → t ≠ YamlToken.flowSequenceStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowMappingStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowEntry) :
                  Scanner.scanFlowEntry s = Except.ok (have __src := (s.emit YamlToken.flowEntry).advance; { input := __src.input, inputEnd := __src.inputEnd, offset := __src.offset, line := __src.line, col := __src.col, indents := __src.indents, flowLevel := __src.flowLevel, tokens := __src.tokens, simpleKey := __src.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := __src.simpleKeyStack, needIndentCheck := __src.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := __src.allowDirectives, seenYamlDirective := __src.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := __src.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := __src.documentEverStarted, flowStack := __src.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := __src.explicitKeyLine, comments := __src.comments, definedAnchors := __src.definedAnchors })

                  scanFlowEntry succeeds when the last real token is not a flow delimiter (flowSequenceStart, flowMappingStart, or flowEntry). This holds whenever we've just scanned a content token (scalar, etc.).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowEntry_detail (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (rest : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := ',' :: rest, col := s.col }) (h_last : ∀ (t : YamlToken), Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? s.tokens = some t → t ≠ YamlToken.flowSequenceStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowMappingStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowEntry) :
                  have s' := have __src := (s.emit YamlToken.flowEntry).advance; { input := __src.input, inputEnd := __src.inputEnd, offset := __src.offset, line := __src.line, col := __src.col, indents := __src.indents, flowLevel := __src.flowLevel, tokens := __src.tokens, simpleKey := __src.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := __src.simpleKeyStack, needIndentCheck := __src.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := __src.allowDirectives, seenYamlDirective := __src.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := __src.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := __src.documentEverStarted, flowStack := __src.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := __src.explicitKeyLine, comments := __src.comments, definedAnchors := __src.definedAnchors }; Scanner.scanFlowEntry s = Except.ok s' ∧ CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s' { chars := rest, col := s.col + 1 } ∧ s'.flowLevel = s.flowLevel ∧ s'.directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ s'.indents = s.indents ∧ s'.col = s.col + 1

                  Field preservation through scanFlowEntry.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.lastRealTokenVal_push_non_ph (tokens : Array (Positioned YamlToken)) (tok : Positioned YamlToken) (h_nph : tok.val ≠ YamlToken.placeholder) :
                  Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? (tokens.push tok) = some tok.val
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.lastRealTokenVal_push_two_ph (tokens : Array (Positioned YamlToken)) (ph1 ph2 : Positioned YamlToken) (h1 : ph1.val = YamlToken.placeholder) (h2 : ph2.val = YamlToken.placeholder) (t : YamlToken) (ht : Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? ((tokens.push ph1).push ph2) = some t) :
                  Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? tokens = some t ∨ t = YamlToken.placeholder
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.saveSimpleKey_preserves_lastRealTokenVal_ne_flow (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_last : ∀ (t : YamlToken), Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? s.tokens = some t → t ≠ YamlToken.flowSequenceStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowMappingStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowEntry) (t : YamlToken) (ht : Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? (Scanner.saveSimpleKey s).tokens = some t) :
                  t ≠ YamlToken.flowSequenceStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowMappingStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowEntry
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchFlowIndicators_comma (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_fl : s.flowLevel > 0) (h_last : ∀ (t : YamlToken), Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? s.tokens = some t → t ≠ YamlToken.flowSequenceStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowMappingStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowEntry) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchFlowIndicators s ',' = Except.ok (some (have __src := (s.emit YamlToken.flowEntry).advance; { input := __src.input, inputEnd := __src.inputEnd, offset := __src.offset, line := __src.line, col := __src.col, indents := __src.indents, flowLevel := __src.flowLevel, tokens := __src.tokens, simpleKey := __src.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := __src.simpleKeyStack, needIndentCheck := __src.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := __src.allowDirectives, seenYamlDirective := __src.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := __src.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := __src.documentEverStarted, flowStack := __src.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := __src.explicitKeyLine, comments := __src.comments, definedAnchors := __src.definedAnchors }))

                  Flow dispatch for , returns some (scanFlowEntry result) when flowLevel > 0.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_flow_comma (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (rest : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := ',' :: rest, col := s.col }) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_indent : s.currentIndent < 0) (h_col_pos : s.col > 0) (h_last : ∀ (t : YamlToken), Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? s.tokens = some t → t ≠ YamlToken.flowSequenceStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowMappingStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowEntry) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s s.line) (h_endline : EndLineOnLine s) :
                  ∃ (s' : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken s = Except.ok (some s') ∧ CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s' { chars := rest, col := s'.col } ∧ s'.flowLevel = s.flowLevel ∧ s'.directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ s'.indents = s.indents ∧ s'.explicitKeyLine = s.explicitKeyLine ∧ s'.col = s.col + 1 ∧ s'.line = s.line ∧ AllTokensOnLine s' s'.line ∧ EndLineOnLine s' ∧ s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

                  Full scanNextToken for , in flow context. Handles preprocessing (skips nothing for non-ws ,), structural dispatch (none), flow dispatch (scanFlowEntry).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceEnd_preserves_dp (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s).directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent

                  Field preservation through scanFlowSequenceEnd: directivesPresent.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceEnd_preserves_indents (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s).indents = s.indents

                  Field preservation through scanFlowSequenceEnd: indents.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceEnd_preserves_ek (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s).explicitKeyLine = s.explicitKeyLine
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceEnd_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s).flowLevel = if s.flowLevel > 0 then s.flowLevel - 1 else 0

                  FlowLevel through scanFlowSequenceEnd: decremented by 1.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceEnd_detail (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (rest : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := ']' :: rest, col := s.col }) :
                  CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s) { chars := rest, col := s.col + 1 } ∧ ((Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s).flowLevel = if s.flowLevel > 0 then s.flowLevel - 1 else 0) ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s).directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s).indents = s.indents ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s).col = s.col + 1

                  ScannerSurfCorr + properties through scanFlowSequenceEnd.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceEnd_lastRealTokenVal (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s).tokens = some YamlToken.flowSequenceEnd

                  Token property: scanFlowSequenceEnd ends with .flowSequenceEnd as last real token.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.validateFlowClose_pass_nested (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_fl : s.flowLevel > 0) :
                  Scanner.validateFlowClose s = Except.ok ()

                  validateFlowClose passes when flowLevel > 0.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.skipTrailingSpaces_at_eof (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) (h : s.peek? = none) :
                  Scanner.skipTrailingSpaces s n = s

                  skipTrailingSpaces at EOF is a no-op.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.validateFlowClose_pass_eof (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_fl : s.flowLevel = 0) (h_eof : s.peek? = none) :
                  Scanner.validateFlowClose s = Except.ok ()

                  validateFlowClose passes at flowLevel = 0 when peek? = none (EOF).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchFlowIndicators_close_bracket_nested (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_fl : s.flowLevel ≥ 2) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchFlowIndicators s ']' = Except.ok (some (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s))

                  Flow dispatch for ] returns some (scanFlowSequenceEnd s) when flowLevel ≥ 2 (nested case — validateFlowClose is no-op).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_flow_close_seq_nested (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (rest : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := ']' :: rest, col := s.col }) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_indent : s.currentIndent < 0) (h_col_pos : s.col > 0) (h_fl_ge2 : s.flowLevel ≥ 2) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s s.line) (h_stack_endline : StackEndLineOnLine s s.line) :
                  ∃ (s' : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken s = Except.ok (some s') ∧ CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s' { chars := rest, col := s'.col } ∧ s'.flowLevel = s.flowLevel - 1 ∧ s'.directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ s'.indents = s.indents ∧ s'.explicitKeyLine = s.explicitKeyLine ∧ s'.col = s.col + 1 ∧ (∀ (t : YamlToken), Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? s'.tokens = some t → t ≠ YamlToken.flowSequenceStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowMappingStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowEntry) ∧ s'.simpleKeyAllowed = false ∧ s'.line = s.line ∧ AllTokensOnLine s' s'.line ∧ EndLineOnLine s' ∧ s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack.pop

                  Full scanNextToken for ] in flow context when flowLevel ≥ 2 (nested flow close — no validateFlowClose concern).

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowSequenceEnd_peek (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s).peek? = (s.emit YamlToken.flowSequenceEnd).advance.peek?

                  scanFlowSequenceEnd preserves peek? from the underlying advance.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchFlowIndicators_close_bracket_outermost (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_fl : s.flowLevel = 1) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := [']'], col := s.col }) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchFlowIndicators s ']' = Except.ok (some (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s))

                  Flow dispatch for ] when flowLevel = 1 and at EOF (outermost close). After scanFlowSequenceEnd, flowLevel = 0 and validateFlowClose passes.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_flow_close_seq_outermost (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := [']'], col := s.col }) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_indent : s.currentIndent < 0) (h_col_pos : s.col > 0) (h_fl : s.flowLevel = 1) (h_dp : s.directivesPresent = false) :
                  ∃ (s' : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken s = Except.ok (some s') ∧ s'.flowLevel = 0 ∧ s'.directivesPresent = false ∧ s'.peek? = none

                  Full scanNextToken for ] at flowLevel = 1 (outermost flow close). The result has flowLevel = 0, directivesPresent = false.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingStart_preserves_dp (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s).directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingStart_preserves_indents (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s).indents = s.indents
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingStart_preserves_ek (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s).explicitKeyLine = s.explicitKeyLine
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingStart_line_eq (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s).line = s.advance.line
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingStart_flowLevel_eq (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s).flowLevel = s.flowLevel + 1
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingStart_detail (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (rest : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := '{' :: rest, col := s.col }) :
                  CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s) { chars := rest, col := s.col + 1 } ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s).flowLevel = s.flowLevel + 1 ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s).directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s).indents = s.indents ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s).col = s.col + 1
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchFlowIndicators_brace (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchFlowIndicators s '{' = Except.ok (some (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s))
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingEnd_preserves_dp (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s).directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingEnd_preserves_indents (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s).indents = s.indents
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingEnd_preserves_ek (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s).explicitKeyLine = s.explicitKeyLine
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingEnd_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s).flowLevel = if s.flowLevel > 0 then s.flowLevel - 1 else 0
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingEnd_detail (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (rest : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := '}' :: rest, col := s.col }) :
                  CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s) { chars := rest, col := s.col + 1 } ∧ ((Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s).flowLevel = if s.flowLevel > 0 then s.flowLevel - 1 else 0) ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s).directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s).indents = s.indents ∧ (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s).col = s.col + 1
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingEnd_lastRealTokenVal (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s).tokens = some YamlToken.flowMappingEnd
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFlowMappingEnd_peek (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s).peek? = (s.emit YamlToken.flowMappingEnd).advance.peek?
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.checkBlockFlowIndent_ok_close_brace (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_checkBlockFlowIndent s '}' = Except.ok ()
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchFlowIndicators_close_brace_nested (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_fl : s.flowLevel ≥ 2) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchFlowIndicators s '}' = Except.ok (some (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s))
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_flow_close_mapping_nested (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (rest : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := '}' :: rest, col := s.col }) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_indent : s.currentIndent < 0) (h_col_pos : s.col > 0) (h_fl_ge2 : s.flowLevel ≥ 2) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s s.line) (h_stack_endline : StackEndLineOnLine s s.line) :
                  ∃ (s' : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken s = Except.ok (some s') ∧ CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s' { chars := rest, col := s'.col } ∧ s'.flowLevel = s.flowLevel - 1 ∧ s'.directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ s'.indents = s.indents ∧ s'.explicitKeyLine = s.explicitKeyLine ∧ s'.col = s.col + 1 ∧ (∀ (t : YamlToken), Scanner.lastRealTokenVal? s'.tokens = some t → t ≠ YamlToken.flowSequenceStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowMappingStart ∧ t ≠ YamlToken.flowEntry) ∧ s'.simpleKeyAllowed = false ∧ s'.line = s.line ∧ AllTokensOnLine s' s'.line ∧ EndLineOnLine s' ∧ s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack.pop
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchFlowIndicators_close_brace_outermost (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_fl : s.flowLevel = 1) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := ['}'], col := s.col }) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchFlowIndicators s '}' = Except.ok (some (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s))
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_flow_close_mapping_outermost (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := ['}'], col := s.col }) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_indent : s.currentIndent < 0) (h_col_pos : s.col > 0) (h_fl : s.flowLevel = 1) (h_dp : s.directivesPresent = false) :
                  ∃ (s' : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken s = Except.ok (some s') ∧ s'.flowLevel = 0 ∧ s'.directivesPresent = false ∧ s'.peek? = none
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_flow_open_mapping_nested (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (rest : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := '{' :: rest, col := s.col }) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_indent : s.currentIndent < 0) (h_col_pos : s.col > 0) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s s.line) (h_endline : EndLineOnLine s) :
                  ∃ (s' : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken s = Except.ok (some s') ∧ CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s' { chars := rest, col := s'.col } ∧ s'.flowLevel = s.flowLevel + 1 ∧ s'.directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ s'.indents = s.indents ∧ s'.explicitKeyLine = s.explicitKeyLine ∧ s'.col = s.col + 1 ∧ s'.line = s.line ∧ AllTokensOnLine s' s'.line ∧ EndLineOnLine s' ∧ StackEndLineOnLine s' s'.line ∧ s'.simpleKeyStack.pop = s.simpleKeyStack
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.dispatchStructural_none_brace_init (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_fl : s.flowLevel = 0) (h_noDocStart : Scanner.atDocumentStart s = false) (h_noDocEnd : Scanner.atDocumentEnd s = false) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchStructural s '{' = Except.ok none

                  Structural dispatch returns none for { at initial state.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.checkBlockFlowIndent_brace_init (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_fl : s.flowLevel = 0) (h_indent : s.currentIndent = -1) :
                  Scanner.scanNextToken_checkBlockFlowIndent s '{' = Except.ok ()

                  checkBlockFlowIndent passes for { at initial state.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_flow_open_mapping_init (input : String) (rest : List Char) (h_toList : input.toList = '{' :: rest) :
                  have s₀ := (Scanner.ScannerState.mk' input).emit YamlToken.streamStart; ∃ (s' : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken s₀ = Except.ok (some s') ∧ CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s' { chars := rest, col := s'.col } ∧ s'.flowLevel = 1 ∧ s'.directivesPresent = false ∧ s'.indents = s₀.indents ∧ s'.col = 1 ∧ s'.inFlow = true ∧ s'.currentIndent < 0 ∧ s'.explicitKeyLine = none ∧ s'.line = 0 ∧ AllTokensOnLine s' 0 ∧ EndLineOnLine s' ∧ s'.simpleKey.possible = false ∧ Array.map (fun (x : Positioned YamlToken) => x.val) (Array.filter (fun (t : Positioned YamlToken) => t.val != YamlToken.placeholder) s'.tokens) = #[YamlToken.streamStart, YamlToken.flowMappingStart] ∧ s'.simpleKeyStack.size = s'.flowLevel

                  scanNextToken on the initial scanner state at { dispatches to scanFlowMappingStart, entering flow context. Result state has flowLevel = 1, col = 1, and ScannerSurfCorr at rest.

                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.emit_first_char (v : YamlValue) :
                  ∃ (c : Char), ∃ (rest' : List Char), (Emit.emit v).toList = c :: rest' ∧ CharPredicates.isWhiteSpaceBool c = false ∧ CharPredicates.isLineBreakBool c = false ∧ c ≠ '#'
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.emitList_first_char (v : YamlValue) (vs : List YamlValue) :
                  ∃ (c : Char), ∃ (rest' : List Char), (Emit.emit.emitList (v :: vs)).toList = c :: rest' ∧ CharPredicates.isWhiteSpaceBool c = false ∧ CharPredicates.isLineBreakBool c = false ∧ c ≠ '#'
                  source
                  theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.emitList_toList_ne_nil (v : YamlValue) (vs : List YamlValue) :
                  (Emit.emit.emitList (v :: vs)).toList ≠ []
                  source
                  def L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.EmitScansInFlow (v : YamlValue) :
                  Prop

                  EmitScansInFlow v asserts that emit v can be scanned successfully from any scanner state in flow context.

                  This is the inductive property needed for flow collection composition: each sub-expression of a flow collection scans correctly from mid-stream, preserving scanner invariants for subsequent tokens.

                  Equations
                  • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                  Instances For
                    source
                    def L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.EmitListScansInFlow (items : List YamlValue) :
                    Prop

                    EmitListScansInFlow items asserts that scanning the comma-separated emitList output succeeds in flow context, preserving invariants. This is the body between [ and ] in a flow sequence.

                    Equations
                    • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                    Instances For
                      source
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.emitList_scans_empty :
                      EmitListScansInFlow []

                      Empty list body is trivially scanned (0-step chain).

                      source
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.emitList_scans_nonempty (items : List YamlValue) (h_ne : items ≠ []) (h_all : ∀ (v : YamlValue), v ∈ items → EmitScansInFlow v) :
                      EmitListScansInFlow items

                      Non-empty list scanning via induction on the item list. Structure: singleton case uses EmitScansInFlow directly; multi-item case chains emit v + comma + space + recursive emitList.

                      source
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.emitPairList_first_char (p : YamlValue × YamlValue) (ps : List (YamlValue × YamlValue)) :
                      ∃ (c : Char), ∃ (rest' : List Char), (Emit.emit.emitPairList (p :: ps)).toList = c :: rest' ∧ CharPredicates.isWhiteSpaceBool c = false ∧ CharPredicates.isLineBreakBool c = false ∧ c ≠ '#'
                      source
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.isValueCandidate_of_peekAt_blank (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : s.peekAt? 1 = some ' ') :
                      Scanner.isValueCandidate s = true
                      source
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanNextToken_flow_value (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (rest' : List Char) (hcorr : CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s { chars := ':' :: ' ' :: rest', col := s.col }) (h_flow : s.inFlow = true) (h_indent : s.currentIndent < 0) (h_col_pos : s.col > 0) (h_ek : s.explicitKeyLine = none) (h_sv : Scanner.scanValueValidate (Scanner.saveSimpleKey s) = Except.ok ()) (h_atol : AllTokensOnLine s s.line) (h_endline : EndLineOnLine s) :
                      ∃ (s' : Scanner.ScannerState), Scanner.scanNextToken s = Except.ok (some s') ∧ CouplingBridge.ScannerSurfCorr s' { chars := ' ' :: rest', col := s'.col } ∧ s'.flowLevel = s.flowLevel ∧ s'.directivesPresent = s.directivesPresent ∧ s'.indents = s.indents ∧ s'.col = s.col + 1 ∧ s'.inFlow = true ∧ s'.currentIndent < 0 ∧ s'.explicitKeyLine = none ∧ s'.line = s.line ∧ AllTokensOnLine s' s'.line ∧ EndLineOnLine s' ∧ s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
                      source

                      Prop

                      EmitPairListScansInFlow pairs asserts that scanning the emitPairList output succeeds in flow context, preserving invariants. This is the body between { and } in a flow mapping.

                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.emitPairList_scans_empty :
                        EmitPairListScansInFlow []
                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.emitPairList_scans_nonempty (pairs : List (YamlValue × YamlValue)) (h_ne : pairs ≠ []) (h_all_k : ∀ (p : YamlValue × YamlValue), p ∈ pairs → EmitScansInFlow p.fst) (h_all_v : ∀ (p : YamlValue × YamlValue), p ∈ pairs → EmitScansInFlow p.snd) :

                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.emit_scans_in_flow (v : YamlValue) {inFlow : Bool} (hg : Grammar.Grammable v inFlow) :
                        EmitScansInFlow v

                        Every grammable value satisfies EmitScansInFlow.

                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFiltered_exists_of_isOk {s : String} (h : (Scanner.scanFiltered s).toBool = true) :
                        ∃ (tokens : Array (Positioned YamlToken)), Scanner.scanFiltered s = Except.ok tokens
                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.emit_produces_valid_yaml (v : YamlValue) {inFlow : Bool} (hg : Grammar.Grammable v inFlow) :
                        ∃ (tokens : Array (Positioned YamlToken)), Scanner.scanFiltered (Emit.emit v) = Except.ok tokens

                        Main theorem: The scanner accepts any canonical emitter output.

                        For any grammable YamlValue, scanFiltered (emit v) succeeds. This is Step 1 of the universal round-trip proof.

                        Proof strategy: Structural induction on YamlValue.

                        • Scalar case: delegates to scan_accepts_emitScalar
                        • Sequence/mapping cases: delegates to scanner acceptance of flow collections with inductively-accepted sub-expressions
                        • Alias case: impossible (excluded by Grammable)

                        Note: generalized to arbitrary inFlow to enable structural induction on Grammable. The emit function ignores inFlow (always produces flow format), so scanner acceptance is independent of the flow context under which the value is grammable.

                        §4 Full Pipeline: Emit → Scan → Parse #

                        Combining scanner acceptance (Step 1) with parser acceptance (Step 2).

                        Step 2 Architecture #

                        Step 1 gives us scanFiltered (emit v) = .ok tokens. Step 2 must show that parseStream also succeeds on those tokens. The key argument:

                        1. Stream boundaries: scanFiltered always produces streamStart as the first token and streamEnd as the last (by scanner construction).
                        2. Single implicit document: The emitter produces no ---/... markers and no directives, so parseStreamLoop in .initial state sees bare content → enters parseDocument with no directive overhead.
                        3. No bare-document violation: After the single document is parsed, only streamEnd remains. StreamState.validNextToken .afterDocument .streamEnd is always true, so invalidBareDocument cannot fire.
                        4. Parser dispatch succeeds: parseNode dispatches on token type:
                          • scalar (double-quoted) → single token consumption, always succeeds
                          • flowSequenceStart → parseFlowSequence handles [, ,, ]
                          • flowMappingStart → parseFlowMapping handles {, :, ,, }
                        5. Fuel sufficiency: parseStream allocates tokens.size fuel. Each recursive parseNode call consumes ≥1 token, so fuel cannot be exhausted for well-formed flow output.
                        6. No semantic errors: The emitter produces no anchors (no duplicateAnchor), no aliases (no undefinedAlias), no tags (no undeclaredTagHandle), and no block content (no trailingContent on document start line).
                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.parseStreamLoop_single_doc (ps : TokenParser.ParseState) (fuel : Nat) (h_fuel : fuel ≥ 2) (tok : YamlToken) (h_peek : ps.peek? = some tok) (h_not_se : tok ≠ YamlToken.streamEnd) (doc : YamlDocument) (ps' : TokenParser.ParseState) (h_doc : TokenParser.parseDocument ps = Except.ok (doc, ps')) (h_peek' : ps'.peek? = some YamlToken.streamEnd) :
                        TokenParser.parseStreamLoop ps #[] TokenParser.StreamState.initial fuel = Except.ok #[doc]
                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.emit_parsed_grammable (v : YamlValue) (docs : Array YamlDocument) (h : TokenParser.parseYaml (Emit.emit v) = Except.ok docs) (doc : YamlDocument) :
                        doc ∈ docs.toList → Grammar.Grammable doc.value false

                        Grammability preservation: The parsed output of emitter output is grammable. Follows from parseStream_output_grammable applied to the scan+parse decomposition.

                        §5 Content Fidelity Infrastructure #

                        Helper lemmas for the content fidelity proof (emit_roundtrip_content_eq).

                        §5.1 Compose invariance for scalars #

                        YamlDocument.compose applies resolveAliases and stripAnchors. For scalars, resolveAliases is identity and stripAnchors only clears the anchor field. Since contentEq ignores anchors, compose doesn't affect content equivalence for scalars.

                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.resolveAliases_scalar (s : Scalar) (anchors : Array (String × YamlValue)) :
                        (YamlValue.scalar s).resolveAliases anchors = YamlValue.scalar s
                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.stripAnchors_scalar (s : Scalar) :
                        (YamlValue.scalar s).stripAnchors = YamlValue.scalar { content := s.content, style := s.style, tag := s.tag, blockMeta := s.blockMeta }
                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.compose_scalar_content (doc : YamlDocument) (s : Scalar) (h_val : doc.value = YamlValue.scalar s) :
                        doc.compose.value = YamlValue.scalar { content := s.content, style := s.style, tag := s.tag, blockMeta := s.blockMeta }
                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.contentEq_scalar_content (s₁ s₂ : Scalar) (h : s₁.content = s₂.content) :
                        Emit.contentEq (YamlValue.scalar s₁) (YamlValue.scalar s₂) = true
                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.contentEq_scalar_compose (s_orig s_parsed : Scalar) (h_content : s_orig.content = s_parsed.content) :
                        Emit.contentEq (YamlValue.scalar s_orig) (YamlValue.scalar { content := s_parsed.content, style := s_parsed.style, tag := s_parsed.tag, blockMeta := s_parsed.blockMeta }) = true

                        §5.2 Scanner content preservation #

                        The scanner's double-quoted collector recovers the original content string from the emitter's escape-encoded output. This is the key roundtrip property.

                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFiltered_emitScalar_content (content : String) (tokens : Array (Positioned YamlToken)) (h_scan : Scanner.scanFiltered (Emit.emitScalar content) = Except.ok tokens) :
                        ∃ (i : Nat), i < tokens.size ∧ tokens[i]!.val = YamlToken.scalar content ScalarStyle.doubleQuoted

                        Scanner content preservation: scanning emitScalar content produces a token stream where the scalar token's content equals the original.

                        This bridges the emitter's escapeString encoding with the scanner's collectDoubleQuotedLoop + processEscape decoding. The proof follows from collectDoubleQuotedLoop_escapeString_succeeds strengthened with content equality (the loop accumulator reconstructs the original string).

                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.scanFiltered_emitScalar_vals (content : String) (tokens : Array (Positioned YamlToken)) (h_scan : Scanner.scanFiltered (Emit.emitScalar content) = Except.ok tokens) :
                        tokens.size = 3 ∧ tokens[0]!.val = YamlToken.streamStart ∧ tokens[1]!.val = YamlToken.scalar content ScalarStyle.doubleQuoted ∧ tokens[2]!.val = YamlToken.streamEnd

                        Token structure: the filtered scan of emitScalar content produces exactly 3 tokens: streamStart, scalar content .doubleQuoted, streamEnd. This follows from the scanner producing [streamStart, ph, ph, scalar, streamEnd] (where ph are saveSimpleKey placeholders) and filtering removes placeholders.

                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.parseDirectives_skip (ps : TokenParser.ParseState) (h : match ps.peek? with | some (YamlToken.versionDirective major minor) => False | some (YamlToken.tagDirective handle tagPrefix) => False | x => True) :
                        TokenParser.parseDirectives ps = (#[], ps)

                        When parseDirectives sees a non-directive token, it returns immediately with empty directives and unchanged state. The for _ in [:fuel] do loop breaks on the first iteration because peek? matches | _ => break.

                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.parseNodeProperties_skip (ps : TokenParser.ParseState) (h : match ps.peek? with | some (YamlToken.anchor name) => False | some (YamlToken.tag handle suffix) => False | x => True) :
                        TokenParser.parseNodeProperties ps = Except.ok ({ }, ps)
                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.parseStream_three_tokens_scalar (content : String) (tokens : Array (Positioned YamlToken)) (h_sz : tokens.size = 3) (h_t0 : tokens[0]!.val = YamlToken.streamStart) (h_t1 : tokens[1]!.val = YamlToken.scalar content ScalarStyle.doubleQuoted) (h_t2 : tokens[2]!.val = YamlToken.streamEnd) :
                        ∃ (docs : Array YamlDocument), TokenParser.parseStream tokens = Except.ok docs ∧ docs.size = 1 ∧ docs[0]!.value = YamlValue.scalar { content := content, style := ScalarStyle.doubleQuoted }
                        source
                        theorem L4YAML.Proofs.EmitterScannability.parseYamlRaw_emitScalar_value (content : String) (raw_docs : Array YamlDocument) (h_raw : TokenParser.parseYamlRaw (Emit.emitScalar content) = Except.ok raw_docs) :
                        ∃ (s : Scalar), raw_docs[0]!.value = YamlValue.scalar s ∧ s.content = content

                        parseYamlRaw on emitScalar produces scalar value: When parseYamlRaw succeeds on emitter scalar output, the first document's value is a scalar with the original content.

                        source

                        Bool
